name: PVC Drainage Pipe Calculator
seo_title: PVC Drainage Pipe Calculator – Length & Fittings
seo_description: Calculate PVC drainage pipe lengths, elbows, couplings and tees. Free plumbing calculator.
example_label: Calculatete PVC drainage pipes for a 20m run with 4 branches.

range_hints.longitud: Total length of drainage pipe run

result_context: For a {length}m run: {barras_3m} lengths of 3m pipe, {codos_ud} elbows, {manguitos_ud} couplings and {tee_ud} tees.
formula_display: Pipe lengths = Length x 1.10 (waste) / 3; Fittings based on branches
steps: Calculatete pipe length with 10% waste: 20m x 1.10 = 22m
mistakes: Use slope inferior to the 1% (risk of obstrucción per sedimentación)
Instalar pipe of PVC to water caliente sanitaria without Verify temperature máxima (60°C)
Not prever registros of limpieza each 15 m in tramos rectos
description: Size PVC sewer pipes using Manning's formula. Calculate flow capacity and velocity for gravity drainage systems.
desc: Size PVC sewer pipes using Manning's formula. Calculate flow capacity and velocity for gravity drainage systems.
